title: Upon Trap.
content:
Trap of a player turn'd a priest now is:
    Behold a sudden metamorphosis.
    If tithe-pigs fail, then will he shift the scene,
    And from a priest turn player once again.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Trap."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
